	Created complete project structure with:
	- Backend: Express.js API with models, controllers, routes
	- Frontend: React + Vite with modern UI
	- Database: MongoDB schemas with Mongoose
	- Configuration: Tailwind, PostCSS, Vite configs

- [x] Customize the Project
	Implemented all requirements:
	- AI allocation algorithm with weighted scoring
	- JWT authentication with role-based access
	- Three user roles: Volunteer, Organizer, Admin

	- Real-time assignment management
	- Attendance tracking
	- Analytics & leaderboard
	- Auto-reallocation logic

	No specific extensions required - project uses standard npm packages

	All files created and ready for npm install:
	- Backend: server.js with 5 model files, 5 controller files, 5 route files
	- Frontend: 11 page components, 4 reusable components, utilities
	- Configuration: vite.config.js, tailwind.config.js, postcss.config.js

- [x] Create and Run Task
	Project is ready for npm install and npm run dev
	- Backend: npm run dev (runs on port 5000)
	- Frontend: npm run dev (runs on port 5173)
